Together, the dividend decision and Hod Maden restructuring highlight how Royal Gold is rebalancing between direct project ownership and royalty-based exposure to future mine output. news.title: SentinelOne provides tepid quarterly forecast, to cut 8% jobs
news.summary: Cybersecurity company SentinelOne forecast second-quarter revenue below analysts' expectations on Thursday and said it would cut ‌about 8% of its workforce as it looks to invest ‌in growth areas such as AI, data and cloud.  • SentinelOne faces intense competition from larger rivals such as CrowdStrike and Palo Alto Networks, as well as from Microsoft, which is bundling security ‌features into its products.  • ⁠Even as ransomware and nation-state threats boost cybersecurity demand, some corporate clients are tightening their budgets, scrutinizing ⁠deals and extending sales cycles.

news.title: Why the SpaceX, Tesla merger could hurt Tesla shareholders
news.summary: Yahoo Finance's Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Market Domination to break down the potential merger between SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) and Tesla (TSLA), revealing why it may not be a great move for Tesla shareholders and why it may be a power move for Elon Musk.

news.title: Oil, stocks mixed as US-Iran deal awaits Trump approval
news.summary: Oil prices diverged and global stock markets were mixed Thursday as a ceasefire extension deal between United States and Iranian negotiators awaited the green light from President Donald Trump.But on Thursday, US sources told AFP that United States and Iranian negotiators had agreed on a framework for a 60-day ceasefire extension deal, although it still requires Trump's approval.

news.title: Tesla Marks 6-Day Winning Streak as Buyers Wait for Big AI Updates
news.summary: Tesla  stock opened lower, but eked out a gain on Thursday, keeping its winning streak intact as investors look for more concrete artificial intelligence-related news.  A precise reason for the early slide was hard to suss out.  To be sure, any news on the Chinese car market can move Tesla stock.
